mapper.insert: INSERT INTO invoice_detail (invoice_id, repayment_record_id, contract_id, contract_no, fee_type, tax_class_code, tax_class_name, interest_start_date, interest_end_date, principal_amount, annual_rate, interest_amount, tax_rate, tax_amount, total_amount) VALUES (#{invoiceId}, #{repaymentRecordId}, #{contractId}, #{contractNo}, #{feeType}, #{taxClassCode}, #{taxClassName}, #{interestStartDate}, #{interestEndDate}, #{principalAmount}, #{annualRate}, #{interestAmount}, #{taxRate}, #{taxAmount}, #{totalAmount})
mapper.select: SELECT fee_type AS feeType, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS totalAmount FROM invoice_detail GROUP BY fee_type
